name: Sweet and Sour Mini Shrimp Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 1/2 medium red or green bell pepper, cut into 20 pieces
1/3 cup purchased sweet and sour sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. For each kabob, thread one shrimp, one bell pepper piece, and one pineapple chunk onto a toothpick.
3. Place the kabobs in an ungreased baking dish measuring 15x10x1 inch.
4. Brush each kabob with half of the sweet and sour sauce.
5. Bake for 5 minutes at 350°F.
6. Turn the kabobs over and brush the remaining sauce onto them.
7. Continue baking for another 5 minutes or until the shrimp turn pink.
8. Makes 20 appetizers.
